full_text:
Humu Ban (Jipi) 胡母班 (季皮)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Humu Ban (胡母班), styledJipi (季皮), was born in Taishan. Sent by Dong Zhuo to pursuade Yuan Shao to lay down his arms. Executed by Wang Kuang. Humu Ban was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Dong Zhuo. Humu Ban lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
